title: partner_schema.integration_accounts
description: Row shape for the integration_accounts view (PostgreSQL types mapped for typical node-pg / JSON output).

current_balance.description: numeric; node-pg often returns NUMERIC as string

current_units.description: numeric; node-pg often returns NUMERIC as string

matured_units.description: numeric; node-pg often returns NUMERIC as string

created_at.description: timestamp with time zone (ISO 8601 when serialized)

updated_at.description: timestamp with time zone (ISO 8601 when serialized)
